Description: Turn deterministic similarity signals and DINOv2 embeddings into two-stage per-day clusters.

Stories.StoryDescription: Group near-duplicate photos into burst groups using configurable time-gap, perceptual-hash, and histogram thresholds.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project groups same-scene burst candidates deterministically before semantic clustering.

Stories.StoryDescription: Generate normalized embeddings for accepted photos and use burst representatives as Stage 2 semantic-clustering inputs.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Burst representatives can be embedded and compared via cosine distance.

Stories.StoryDescription: Cluster burst representatives with deterministic agglomerative clustering using a configurable cosine-distance threshold.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project produces deterministic within-day clusters without relying on HDBSCAN.

Stories.StoryDescription: Propagate final cluster IDs from burst representatives back to all photos in the original burst groups.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Every accepted photo in a day receives a final Epic 2 cluster assignment.

Stories.StoryDescription: Choose one representative photo per final cluster as the medoid based on embedding distances.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Each final cluster has a deterministic representative photo for inspection and later ranking.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add unit tests covering single-photo days, duplicate-heavy groups, mixed-scene days, and medoid selection.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Automated tests verify burst grouping, semantic clustering, and medoid selection stability.
